{{Quote|Simplicity can be achieved; life is just all zeros and ones.|Mon Cal philosopher|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''</ref>}}
'''Q9-01''', also known as '''Zero-One''', was a [[Q9-series astromech droid]] equipped with a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocoder]]. Zero-One was [[Kyp Durron]]'s personal astromech during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] that he received from a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] philosopher who was fascinated with ancient cultures and technologies. He was so fond of a computer system based on binary that he named his droid after the numbers "0" and "1".

{{Droid-stub}}
